title: artemisia dracunculus var. humilis
intro: Artemisia dracunculus var. humilis, also known as Russian tarragon or dwarf tarragon, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family, native to Asia. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Russian tarragon can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used as a culinary herb in various dishes.
